transcription.text: It's boys that are beautiful, energetic, joyous, eager, made of fun. That's why Don Moore makes Banlon shirts of colorful Cabriolet nylon. They're beautiful too, moving, playing, jumping. Don Moore shirts, made for fun, just made for boys.
